'''pomaraka''' is an [[Aelaki]] [[Adjectives|adjective]] meaning "[[Wikt:rubbed|rubbed]] (auto-generated)".

== Overview ==
{| class="wikitable"
|-
! Root consonants
| p-m-r
|-
! Word class
| [[Adjective]]
|-
! Gloss
| [[Wikt:rubbed|rubbed]] (auto-generated)
|-
! Citation form
| pomaraka
|}

== Agreement paradigm ==
''Positive degree, no evidential.''
{| class="wikitable sortable"
! Gender.Number !! 1st !! 2nd !! 3rd !! 4th
|-
| [[child]].[[collective]] || [[word:pomarithi|pomarithi]] || [[word:pomariji|pomariji]] || [[word:pomarishi|pomarishi]] || [[word:pomariki|pomariki]]
|-
| [[child]].[[plural]] || [[word:pomaruthuthu|pomaruthuthu]] || [[word:pomarujuju|pomarujuju]] || [[word:pomarushushu|pomarushushu]] || [[word:pomarukuku|pomarukuku]]
|-
| [[child]].[[singular]] || [[word:pomaruthu|pomaruthu]] || [[word:pomaruju|pomaruju]] || [[word:pomarushu|pomarushu]] || [[word:pomaruku|pomaruku]]
|-
| [[child]].[[zero]] || [[word:pomarufthuf|pomarufthuf]] || [[word:pomarufjuf|pomarufjuf]] || [[word:pomarufshuf|pomarufshuf]] || [[word:pomarufkuf|pomarufkuf]]
|-
| [[female]].[[collective]] || [[word:pomarethe|pomarethe]] || [[word:pomareje|pomareje]] || [[word:pomareshe|pomareshe]] || [[word:pomareke|pomareke]]
|-
| [[female]].[[plural]] || [[word:pomarothotho|pomarothotho]] || [[word:pomarojojo|pomarojojo]] || [[word:pomaroshosho|pomaroshosho]] || [[word:pomarokoko|pomarokoko]]
|-
| [[female]].[[singular]] || [[word:pomarotho|pomarotho]] || [[word:pomarojo|pomarojo]] || [[word:pomarosho|pomarosho]] || [[word:pomaroko|pomaroko]]
|-
| [[female]].[[zero]] || [[word:pomarofthof|pomarofthof]] || [[word:pomarofjof|pomarofjof]] || [[word:pomarofshof|pomarofshof]] || [[word:pomarofkof|pomarofkof]]
|-
| [[inanimate]].[[collective]] || [[word:pomarÃŸfthÃŸf|pomarÃŸfthÃŸf]] || [[word:pomarÃŸfjÃŸf|pomarÃŸfjÃŸf]] || [[word:pomarÃŸfshÃŸf|pomarÃŸfshÃŸf]] || [[word:pomarÃŸfkÃŸf|pomarÃŸfkÃŸf]]
|-
| [[inanimate]].[[plural]] || [[word:pomarÃŸfthÃŸfthÃŸf|pomarÃŸfthÃŸfthÃŸf]] || [[word:pomarÃŸfjÃŸfjÃŸf|pomarÃŸfjÃŸfjÃŸf]] || [[word:pomarÃŸfshÃŸfshÃŸf|pomarÃŸfshÃŸfshÃŸf]] || [[word:pomarÃŸfkÃŸfkÃŸf|pomarÃŸfkÃŸfkÃŸf]]
|-
| [[inanimate]].[[singular]] || [[word:pomarÃŸfthÃŸf|pomarÃŸfthÃŸf]] || [[word:pomarÃŸfjÃŸf|pomarÃŸfjÃŸf]] || [[word:pomarÃŸfshÃŸf|pomarÃŸfshÃŸf]] || [[word:pomarÃŸfkÃŸf|pomarÃŸfkÃŸf]]
|-
| [[inanimate]].[[zero]] || [[word:pomarÃŸfthÃŸf|pomarÃŸfthÃŸf]] || [[word:pomarÃŸfjÃŸf|pomarÃŸfjÃŸf]] || [[word:pomarÃŸfshÃŸf|pomarÃŸfshÃŸf]] || [[word:pomarÃŸfkÃŸf|pomarÃŸfkÃŸf]]
|-
| [[male]].[[collective]] || [[word:pomarÃḊthÃḊ|pomarÃḊthÃḊ]] || [[word:pomarÃḊjÃḊ|pomarÃḊjÃḊ]] || [[word:pomarÃḊshÃḊ|pomarÃḊshÃḊ]] || [[word:pomarÃḊkÃḊ|pomarÃḊkÃḊ]]
|-
| [[male]].[[plural]] || [[word:pomarathatha|pomarathatha]] || [[word:pomarajaja|pomarajaja]] || [[word:pomarashasha|pomarashasha]] || [[word:pomarakaka|pomarakaka]]
|-
| [[male]].[[singular]] || [[word:pomaratha|pomaratha]] || [[word:pomaraja|pomaraja]] || [[word:pomarasha|pomarasha]] || [[word:pomaraka|pomaraka]]
|-
| [[male]].[[zero]] || [[word:pomarafthaf|pomarafthaf]] || [[word:pomarafjaf|pomarafjaf]] || [[word:pomarafshaf|pomarafshaf]] || [[word:pomarafkaf|pomarafkaf]]
|}

== Evidential and TAM forms ==
{| class="wikitable sortable"
! Form !! Surface form
|-
| [[positive]].none || [[word:pomarasha|pomarasha]]
|-
| [[positive]].[[visual]] || [[word:pomarshÃḋsha|pomarshÃḋsha]]
|-
| [[positive]].[[hearsay]] || [[word:pomarosha|pomarosha]]
|-
| [[positive]].[[inferential]] || [[word:pomarmusha|pomarmusha]]
|-
| [[positive]].[[optative]] || [[word:pomaryasha|pomaryasha]]
|-
| [[positive]].[[hodiernal]]_[[visual]] || [[word:gopomarnkshÃḋsha|gopomarnkshÃḋsha]]
|-
| [[positive]].[[hodiernal]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:gopomarnkrosha|gopomarnkrosha]]
|-
| [[positive]].[[hodiernal]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:gopomarnkmusha|gopomarnkmusha]]
|-
| [[positive]].[[hodiernal]]_[[optative]] || [[word:gopomarnkyasha|gopomarnkyasha]]
|-
| [[comparative]].none || [[word:pomamarasha|pomamarasha]]
|-
| [[comparative]].[[visual]] || [[word:pomamarshÃḋsha|pomamarshÃḋsha]]
|-
| [[comparative]].[[hearsay]] || [[word:pomamarosha|pomamarosha]]
|-
| [[comparative]].[[inferential]] || [[word:pomamarmusha|pomamarmusha]]
|-
| [[comparative]].[[optative]] || [[word:pomamaryasha|pomamaryasha]]
|-
| [[comparative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[visual]] || [[word:gopomamarnkshÃḋsha|gopomamarnkshÃḋsha]]
|-
| [[comparative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:gopomamarnkrosha|gopomamarnkrosha]]
|-
| [[comparative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:gopomamarnkmusha|gopomamarnkmusha]]
|-
| [[comparative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[optative]] || [[word:gopomamarnkyasha|gopomamarnkyasha]]
|-
| [[superlative]].none || [[word:pemÃḊrasha|pemÃḊrasha]]
|-
| [[superlative]].[[visual]] || [[word:pemÃḊrshÃḋsha|pemÃḊrshÃḋsha]]
|-
| [[superlative]].[[hearsay]] || [[word:pemÃḊrosha|pemÃḊrosha]]
|-
| [[superlative]].[[inferential]] || [[word:pemÃḊrmusha|pemÃḊrmusha]]
|-
| [[superlative]].[[optative]] || [[word:pemÃḊryasha|pemÃḊryasha]]
|-
| [[superlative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[visual]] || [[word:gopemÃḊrnkshÃḋsha|gopemÃḊrnkshÃḋsha]]
|-
| [[superlative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:gopemÃḊrnkrosha|gopemÃḊrnkrosha]]
|-
| [[superlative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:gopemÃḊrnkmusha|gopemÃḊrnkmusha]]
|-
| [[superlative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[optative]] || [[word:gopemÃḊrnkyasha|gopemÃḊrnkyasha]]
|-
| [[negative]].none || [[word:pomfarasha|pomfarasha]]
|-
| [[negative]].[[visual]] || [[word:pomfarshÃḋsha|pomfarshÃḋsha]]
|-
| [[negative]].[[hearsay]] || [[word:pomfarosha|pomfarosha]]
|-
| [[negative]].[[inferential]] || [[word:pomfarmusha|pomfarmusha]]
|-
| [[negative]].[[optative]] || [[word:pomfaryasha|pomfaryasha]]
|-
| [[negative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[visual]] || [[word:gopomfarnkshÃḋsha|gopomfarnkshÃḋsha]]
|-
| [[negative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:gopomfarnkrosha|gopomfarnkrosha]]
|-
| [[negative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:gopomfarnkmusha|gopomfarnkmusha]]
|-
| [[negative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[optative]] || [[word:gopomfarnkyasha|gopomfarnkyasha]]
|}

''36 forms generated.''

== See also ==
* [[Aelaki Lexicon]]

[[Category:Aelaki lemmas]]

{{wordpage|4f6272c}}
